Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Raw actions FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE multiple documents Quarterly Report Document1 Budget Email PDF sequences of events per artifact

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Generalizing cases by logical units like editing specific document handling email reviewing PDF updating spreadsheet from observed sequences

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Inferring best case boundaries despite interleaving like Document1 editing spanning email PDF Excel with gaps as pauses

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Proposing cases per primary artifact Document1 QuarterlyReport EmailAnnualMeeting PDFReportDraft BudgetExcel only direct interaction events ignoring SWITCH

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Debating including SWITCH as Suspend Resume or dropping them considering alternatives like whole session one case or per task splits

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Listing all events assigning to cases mapping FOCUS to Open Document TYPING to Edit Document SAVE to Save Document CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT to specific activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Confirming cases have coherent timelines like Open Edit Save gap Edit Save Close for Document1 and similar patterns for others

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Standardizing activities Open Document Edit Document Save Document Close Document Open Email Send Email Review PDF using rules for lowlevel to highlevel
